title: Blog Post for Marketing Campaign
scenario: Create a blog post for a marketing campaign to promote a new product launch. The post should include a brief introduction to the product, its features, and benefits. The post should also include a call-to-action to purchase the product and a link to the product website. The post should be under 250 words and include at least two customer testimonials.
constraints: Must include at least two customer testimonials

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the post meets the word count and customer testimonial requirements.
Evaluate if the post is clear and easy to understand.
Check for any grammar or spelling errors.
Evaluate if the post is relevant to the product and the target audience.
